prompt: 我在 Web 端用 @tencentcloud/chat SDK 做了多端登录，但是用户在第二个 Tab 打开页面后，第一个 Tab 就收不到消息了。这是什么原因？怎么排查？

assertions.text: Response identifies this as a Chat SDK issue
Response identifies Web as the platform
Mentions the Web 10-instance limit or platform instance limits
References onKickedOffline callback as a diagnostic step
Suggests checking getLoginStatus to verify login state
Gives a structured diagnostic flow with multiple branches, not just a single guess
References a specific slice ID like chat/multi-instance (with-skill only)
